stories.title: Supabase project setup
stories.description: Initialize Supabase project, configure auth settings, set up environment variables, enable pgvector extension.
checks: Supabase project exists and is linked
Auth settings configured (email/password signup enabled)
pgvector extension enabled in database
NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL, NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY set in .env.local
OPENAI_API_KEY set in .env.local

stories.title: Tenants table migration + CRUD API
stories.description: Create tenants table with all required fields (name, slug, settings, active status, usage limits, created_at, updated_at). Implement CRUD API routes. Enable RLS.
checks: tenants table exists with all required columns
RLS enabled on tenants table
Super admin can create, list, get, update, deactivate tenants
Client admin cannot access other tenants' data
API returns 403 for unauthorized cross-tenant access

stories.title: Users table + auth trigger
stories.description: Create public.users table referencing auth.users.id. Add role enum (super_admin, client_admin). Create database trigger to auto-create public.users row on auth.users signup. Create invitation/registration flow for client admins.
checks: public.users table exists with id, email, role, tenant_id, created_at
Auth trigger auto-creates public.users row on signup
Super admin can invite client admin users
Client admin users created with correct tenant_id

stories.title: Super Admin login page
stories.description: Create login page with Supabase Auth (email/password). On login, verify role is super_admin. Redirect to super admin dashboard. Handle errors, password reset.
checks: Login form accepts email and password
Super admin credentials redirect to /dashboard/super-admin
Client admin credentials redirect to /dashboard/client-admin
Invalid credentials show error message
Password reset flow works

stories.title: Client Admin login page
stories.description: Create login page scoped to client admin users. On login, verify role is client_admin and user is linked to a tenant. Redirect to client admin dashboard.
checks: Client admin login works
Login restricted to client_admin role only
User sees only their own tenant's data after login
Super admin cannot log in here (redirect to super admin login)

stories.title: RLS policies for all tables
stories.description: Implement comprehensive RLS policies for tenants, users, documents, business_access_tokens, conversations, and audit_logs tables. Super admin sees all. Client admin sees own tenant only. Staff (anon) access limited to token-based business identification.
checks: RLS enabled on every table
Super admin can read/write all rows across all tenants
Client admin can read/write only their own tenant's rows
Anonymous staff access can only read data for their token's business
Cross-tenant access consistently returns empty results or 403

stories.title: business_access_tokens table + API
stories.description: Create business_access_tokens table (tenant_id, token, pin_code, label, active, expires_at, created_at). Implement generate/reset/revoke API. Tokens are UUIDs. PIN is optional numeric code.
checks: Table exists with all required columns
Generate token API creates unique UUID token
Token resolves to correct tenant
Reset token generates new UUID, invalidates old one
Revoke token sets active=false
Expired token returns 403

stories.title: Staff chat page (token-based access)
stories.description: Create /staff/[token] page. On load, validate token, identify business. Show chat interface with business name. No login required. Session tracks business context. Handle invalid/expired tokens.
checks: Valid token shows chat page with correct business name
Invalid token shows error/redirect
Expired/revoked token shows access denied
No login required to access chat
Business context correctly identified from token

stories.title: Optional PIN screen
stories.description: If business_access_token has pin_code set, show PIN entry screen before chat. Validate PIN client-side and server-side. Wrong PIN denies access. Correct PIN enters chat. Rate-limit PIN attempts.
checks: Token with pin_code shows PIN screen before chat
Correct PIN enters chat
Wrong PIN shows error (max 5 attempts before lockout)
Token without pin_code goes directly to chat
PIN validation happens server-side, not just client-side

stories.title: QR code generation in admin dashboard
stories.description: Add QR code display to both super admin and client admin dashboards. QR code encodes the staff access URL. Generate QR code using qrcode.react component.
checks: Super admin can view QR code for any business
Client admin can view QR code for their own business
QR code scans to correct /staff/[token] URL
QR code regenerates when token is reset

stories.title: Access link disable/reset admin UI
stories.description: Add admin UI to disable, enable, and reset staff access tokens. Show token status in admin dashboard. Confirm dialog for destructive actions.
checks: Super admin can disable/enable/reset any business's token
Client admin can disable/enable/reset their own business's token
Disabled token immediately stops working
UI shows confirmation dialog before destructive actions

stories.title: Document upload API + Storage
stories.description: Create document upload endpoint. Store files in Supabase Storage under tenant_id/ prefix. Accept PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD. Validate file type and size (max 10MB). Create documents table with status workflow.
checks: File uploads stored in Supabase Storage under correct tenant prefix
Accepted file types: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD
Rejected file types return 400
Files over 10MB rejected
Document record created in documents table with status='draft'

stories.title: Document status workflow
stories.description: Implement document status transitions: draft -> approved -> archived. Only approved documents available for AI retrieval. Admin UI to approve, archive, or delete documents. Status change updates vector index accordingly.
checks: Document can transition from draft to approved
Document can transition from approved to archived
Document can be deleted (soft or hard)
Only approved documents appear in vector search results
Status change triggers re-indexing

stories.title: OpenAI embeddings + pgvector indexing
stories.description: Generate embeddings using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small. Store in Supabase pgvector. Index by tenant_id for isolated retrieval. Implement vector search function filtered by tenant_id.
checks: Embeddings generated via OpenAI API (not client-side)
Vectors stored in pgvector with tenant_id column
Vector search returns only documents for the requesting tenant
Search returns top 10 most relevant chunks
Embedding dimension matches text-embedding-3-small (1536)

stories.title: Document replacement + re-indexing
stories.description: When document is replaced or updated, delete old vectors, re-embed new content, re-insert. Handle race conditions during re-indexing. Show indexing status in document list.
checks: Replaced document gets new embeddings (old vectors deleted)
Archived document vectors removed from search index
Index status shows processing/active/failed
Concurrent indexing requests handled gracefully

stories.title: OpenAI chat completion endpoint
stories.description: Backend-only API route for OpenAI chat completions. Accept messages + tenant context. Call OpenAI API server-side. Return streaming or complete response. NEVER expose API key to client.
checks: API route at /api/chat accepts POST with messages and tenant_id
OpenAI API key NOT visible in browser network tab
Response contains answer text
Errors handled gracefully (no stack traces exposed)
Model configurable via environment variable

stories.title: Business-scoped pgvector retrieval
stories.description: Before LLM call, retrieve relevant chunks from pgvector filtered by tenant_id. Include retrieved context in the LLM prompt. Chunks must belong to the requesting business only.
checks: Retrieval queries filter by tenant_id
Only approved documents are included in retrieval
Top 5-10 chunks passed to LLM as context
Business A token never retrieves Business B chunks
Retrieval timeout handled gracefully

stories.title: Strict system prompt with escalation rules
stories.description: Create system prompt enforcing: answer only from approved docs, no inventing, escalate for sensitive topics. Escalation categories: injuries, emergencies, harassment, discrimination, payroll, termination, legal, medical, refunds outside policy.
checks: System prompt loaded from server-side config
Prompt instructs to answer only from provided context
Prompt includes escalation categories
Escalation response: 'I can't find an approved answer. Please ask your manager.'
Urgent escalation: 'This may require immediate manager involvement.'

stories.title: Source citation in answers
stories.description: Include document name/source reference in AI answers. Format: 'According to [Document Name]...'. Show which documents were used for each answer in conversation log.
checks: Answer includes document reference when possible
Source documents logged in conversation record
Answer without source if no matching document found (escalation)
Citation format: 'According to [document name] - [section]'

stories.title: Mobile-responsive chat UI
stories.description: Build chat interface with: large readable text, simple input area, disclaimer banner, escalation guidance, business name header. Mobile-first responsive design. Fast initial load.
checks: Chat page works on mobile viewport (375px width)
Text is readable without zooming
Disclaimer visible near input area
Business name displayed in header
Page loads in under 3 seconds on mobile connection
Lighthouse mobile score > 80

stories.title: Super Admin dashboard
stories.description: Full super admin dashboard with: list all businesses, create business, edit business settings, disable business, view all usage, view all conversation logs, manage client admin users per business.
checks: Super admin sees all businesses in table/list
Create business form works (creates tenant + access token)
Edit business settings works
Disable business immediately stops staff access
Super admin can view logs for any business

stories.title: Client Admin dashboard
stories.description: Client admin dashboard with: business settings view, staff access link + QR code display, document list, reset access code, view own conversation logs, view own usage.
checks: Client admin sees only their own business data
Staff access link and QR code displayed
Document list shows only own business documents
Cannot access other businesses' data via URL manipulation
Usage stats shown for current month

stories.title: Conversation logs table + view
stories.description: Store staff questions, AI answers, timestamps, source documents, escalation flag, token usage. Per-business view for client admin. Global view for super admin. Search/filter by date.
checks: Each conversation log has: question, answer, timestamp, sources, escalation_flag, token_count
Client admin sees only their business's logs
Super admin sees all logs with tenant filter
Logs filterable by date range
Escalated questions flagged and filterable

stories.title: Usage tracking per business
stories.description: Track monthly: question count, AI response count, escalation count, token usage, estimated cost. Monthly reset. Display in both dashboards. Store usage in usage_tracking table.
checks: Usage counter increments with each staff question
Usage data scoped by tenant_id and month
Client admin sees their own usage
Super admin sees all businesses' usage
Monthly reset works (counters start fresh each month)

stories.title: Usage caps + near-limit warning
stories.description: Per-business monthly question limit (configurable by super admin). Warning banner when approaching limit (80%). Block questions when limit reached. Super admin can adjust limits per business.
checks: Default limit: 500 questions/month
Warning banner shown at 80% usage
Questions blocked when limit reached with clear message
Super admin can adjust limit per business
Limit check happens server-side (not just client-side)

stories.title: Escalated/missing questions report
stories.description: Report page showing questions where assistant said 'ask a manager'. Helpful for identifying gaps in knowledge base. Both admin roles can view (scoped).
checks: Shows questions that received escalation response
Client admin sees only their business's escalations
Super admin sees all escalations with tenant filter
Identifies patterns in missing knowledge
Exportable or shareable view

stories.title: 50 test cases execution
stories.description: Run 50 realistic test cases covering: questions answered in docs, questions not covered, sensitive topics requiring escalation, cross-tenant isolation, rate limiting, mobile chat, document re-indexing.
checks: 15+ questions clearly answered in documents pass
10+ questions not covered return escalation
10+ sensitive topics return escalation
5 cross-tenant isolation tests pass (Token A cannot access Business B)
5 rate-limiting/abuse tests pass
5 mobile/responsive tests pass

stories.title: Deploy to Vercel
stories.description: Deploy application to Vercel. Configure environment variables. Set up production Supabase project. Verify all features work in production. Configure custom domain if available.
checks: App accessible at production URL
All environment variables configured in Vercel
Supabase production project linked
Auth redirect URLs configured for production
All API routes work in production
HTTPS enforced

stories.title: Admin handover documentation
stories.description: Create handover docs: setup instructions, how to add a new business, how to add client admins, how to generate/reset access links, how to upload/re-index documents, how to view usage/logs, troubleshooting guide.
checks: Setup instructions complete (env vars, Supabase, deploy)
Step-by-step guide for adding a new business
How to add/remove client admin users
How to generate and reset staff access links
How to upload, approve, archive documents
Troubleshooting section for common issues
